attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).

- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

The user is asking me to generate a progress summary as the memory agent observing a different Claude Code session. Let me analyze what happened:

**The User's Request:**
The user asked in Chinese about when the ExtraBet button would open during unshow without showing the MSGBOX_UNSHOW_BACK popup (related to UnshowPrepareState.ts line 153).

**What Was Done (from Claude's response):**
1. Type checking passed (only pre-existing tsconfig deprecation warnings)
2. Modified only `GameView.ts` - specifically the `InitExtraBet` callback cancel branch
3. When cancelled (`confirmed=false`, covering both "direct X" and "no selection then Confirm"):
   - Next frame calls the common `ExtraBetComponent.OnRotation()`
   - Because `m_isExtra` is already false → plays `"ExtraBet_Stop"` to turn off light
   - This overrides the mistaken light-up from common version line :509
4. When confirmed to select card or blocked by bet limit (`confirmed=true`), it doesn't trigger, avoiding mistaken turn-off
5. There's still ~1 frame of Active flash (common version :507 missing `m_isExtra` check, user confirmed accepting this)

**Verification:**
- Type checking passed
- Behavior verification needs real testing in Cocos editor
- Awaiting confirmation to commit to main branch

**What Was Learned:**
- The ExtraBet button was incorrectly lighting up when the two-step ExtraBet was cancelled
- The issue was in the common version's `ChangeBetMode` incorrectly playing Active animation
- The fix involves calling `OnRotation()` in the cancel branch to play the Stop animation

Let me write this as a summary from the observer's perspective, focusing on what was built/fixed, not what I'm doing.

content.text:
<summary>
  <request>Fix ExtraBet button incorrectly lighting up when two-step ExtraBet is cancelled without showing MSGBOX_UNSHOW_BACK popup</request>
  <investigated>Examined GameView.ts InitExtraBet callback behavior, specifically the cancel branch when confirmed=false (covering both direct X close and no-selection Confirm scenarios). Traced the issue to the common version's ChangeBetMode at line :509 incorrectly playing Active animation.</investigated>
  <learned>The ExtraBet button was lighting up incorrectly because the common version's ChangeBetMode lacks an m_isExtra check at line :507, causing it to play "ExtraBet_Active" animation even when the ExtraBet mode was cancelled. When cancelled (confirmed=false), m_isExtra is already set to false. By calling ExtraBetComponent.OnRotation() in the next frame during the cancel branch, it triggers "ExtraBet_Stop" animation to turn off the light, overriding the mistaken light-up. A ~1 frame Active flash still occurs due to the common version's missing guard, which was acknowledged as acceptable.</learned>
  <completed>Modified GameView.ts InitExtraBet callback cancel branch to add next-frame call to ExtraBetComponent.OnRotation() when confirmed=false. This ensures the ExtraBet button turns off properly when cancelled, without affecting confirmed selections or bet limit blocks. Type checking passed with no new errors.</completed>
  <next_steps>Awaiting user confirmation to commit changes to main branch. Behavior verification in Cocos editor is pending (needs manual testing of "open EX → popup → X/no selection Confirm" flow to confirm button turns off immediately).</next_steps>
  <notes>Fix is minimal and surgical - only touches the cancel branch in GameView.ts. Commit message prepared: "修正兩步驟ExtraBet取消後EX按鈕仍發亮(公版ChangeBetMode誤播Active)". Project follows convention of committing directly to main without feature branches.</notes>
</summary>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"g:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\.claudedocs\\\\ExtraBet-公版誤改還原記錄.md\",\"content\":\"# ExtraBet 公版誤改還原記錄\\n\\n**日期**：2026-06-18\\n**檔案**：`extensions/astarte-framework/assets/Component/ExtraBetComponent.ts`（astarte-framework 公版，`extensions/` 被 `.gitignore`、不進專案 git）\\n\\n## 發生什麼\\n\\n之前開發 ExtraBet 功能時，誤把專案需要的一處邏輯改在**共用公版 framework 檔**內，而非專案層。本記錄保留該修正內容，並說明已還原成公版。\\n\\n## 被移除的修正（已還原）\\n\\n位置：`ChangeBetMode()` 開啟分支，動畫播放處（公版約 line 507）。\\n\\n```typescript\\n// ── 公版（已還原成此狀態，與其他 5+ 專案一致）──\\nif ( this.m_multiExtraBetNode )\\n{\\n    this.m_multiExtraBetNode.getComponent( Animation ).play( \\\"ExtraBet_Active\\\" );\\n}\\n\\n// ── 曾被誤加在公版的修正（本次已移除）──\\n// m_isExtra 可能被兩步驟 cancel 的 SetTwoStepMulti 設回 false，只在確認開啟時播\\nif ( this.m_multiExtraBetNode && this.m_isExtra )\\n{\\n    this.m_multiExtraBetNode.getComponent( Animation ).play( \\\"ExtraBet_Active\\\" );\\n}\\n```\\n\\n## 這修正在解什麼問題（潛在 framework bug）\\n\\n- 本專案是 **two-step 變體**（`GameView.ts` 的 `Init(... , true /* isTwoStep */)`）。\\n- 玩家在 ExtraBetWindow 跳窗按**取消** → `SetTwoStepMulti(false, ...)` 把 `m_isExtra = false` 並播 `ExtraBet_OFF`。\\n- 流程回到 `ChangeBetMode` 的動畫播放行，公版**無條件**播 `ExtraBet_Active` → 取消後緊接著又閃一下啟用動畫（視覺 glitch）。\\n- 加 `&& this.m_isExtra` guard 可擋掉。此寫法與同檔別處（`m_isExtra` guard）慣例一致；公版該行缺 guard 屬 framework 自身疏漏。\\n\\n## 還原後的已知代價\\n\\n> ⚠️ **two-step 取消跳窗時，`ExtraBet_Active` 動畫會閃一下**（被本次還原重新引入）。\\n> 用戶（2026-06-18）評估後選擇「保持公版乾淨」優先，接受此 glitch 並記錄。\\n\\n不受影響範圍：\\n- variant A（單步驟）專案不受影響——該處 `m_isExtra` 在此恆為 true。\\n- 其他專案各自獨立 framework 副本，與本次還原無關。\\n\\n## 若 glitch 需要處理，正確做法\\n\\n**不要再改公版檔。** 此邏輯搬不回專案層（`m_isExtra` 與該動畫播放都在 framework 私有 `ChangeBetMode` 內，專案 callback `m_triggerCb` 早於該行觸發、無法抑制）。正解是：\\n\\n1. 把上述 `&& this.m_isExtra` 修正回報給 **astarte-framework 維護者**，進公版後所有 two-step 專案受惠、且不會被下次同步蓋掉；\\n2. 在 framework 正式發版前若臨時需要，於本地重新套用上述 guard，並更新本記錄為「已重新套用、待上游」。\\n\\n## 受影響的 two-step 專案（皆無此 guard，潛在同 bug）\\n\\n`pirate2-client` / `uk_739_wrath_of_thunder_client` / `uk_746_far_west_client` / `uk_722_robinhood_client` / `uk_slot_chachacha`（截至 2026-06-18）。\\n\",\"numLines\":55,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":55}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

4. The user accepted the glitch to keep the framework clean
5. The document notes that the proper fix should be reported to the framework maintainer

Now the user is saying "不行，一樣會發亮" (No, it still lights up), which means the attempted fix in GameView.ts didn't work. They're likely revisiting this issue and looking at the history.

This is a discovery/learning observation - they're researching the previous attempt and understanding why it didn't work.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Previous ExtraBet framework fix was reverted to keep shared code clean</title>
  <subtitle>Framework bug causing ExtraBet_Active flash on cancel was documented but intentionally left unfixed in shared framework.</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>ExtraBetComponent.ts ChangeBetMode() line 507 lacks m_isExtra guard when playing ExtraBet_Active animation</fact>
    <fact>Two-step ExtraBet cancel sets m_isExtra=false but ChangeBetMode unconditionally plays ExtraBet_Active afterward causing visual glitch</fact>
    <fact>Fix adding "&& this.m_isExtra" guard was removed 2026-06-18 to avoid modifying shared astarte-framework in extensions folder</fact>
    <fact>Document .claudedocs/ExtraBet-公版誤改還原記錄.md records the revert decision and known glitch tradeoff</fact>
    <fact>Five other two-step projects (pirate2-client, uk_739, uk_746, uk_722, uk_slot_chachacha) have same potential bug</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The ExtraBet button flash issue on cancel was previously identified and fixed by adding an m_isExtra guard in the framework's ChangeBetMode() method. However, this fix was applied to the shared astarte-framework code in the extensions folder (which is gitignored and shared across 5+ projects). On 2026-06-18, the fix was intentionally reverted to keep the framework clean, with the user accepting the visual glitch. The document recommends the proper approach is to report the fix to the framework maintainer rather than modifying the shared code locally. This explains why attempting to fix it at the GameView.ts layer didn't work - the root cause is in the framework layer where m_triggerCb callbacks execute before the problematic animation line.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
    <concept>gotcha</concept>
    <concept>trade-off</concept>
    <concept>why-it-exists</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
    <file>.claudedocs/ExtraBet-公版誤改還原記錄.md</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

時該事件永不觸發，會讓\\n        // 整條 unshow 還原鏈卡死、MSGBOX_UNSHOW_BACK 跳不出來。把「節點需 active」\\n        // 內聚成本函式自身責任，不再依賴呼叫端的隱藏順序（避免日後改錯順序復發）。\\n        this.SetExtraBetVisible( true );\\n\\n        const type = this.GetUnshowExtraBetType();\\n\\n        // (B) 保底：用 timeout 包住 ForceSetExtraBet。按鈕狀態（m_isExtra/ChangeMultiBet）\\n        // 在 framework 同步段就已設好，掛住的只是後續動畫視覺，逾時放行在功能上安全，\\n        // 可擋住所有未預期的 inactive / null / 缺 Animation 情況，不讓流程凍死。\\n        const EXTRA_BET_FORCE_TIMEOUT_SEC = 2;\\n        await Promise.race( [\\n            this.m_extraBetComp?.ForceSetExtraBet( true, type ) ?? Promise.resolve(),\\n            new Promise<void>( resolve => this.scheduleOnce( resolve, EXTRA_BET_FORCE_TIMEOUT_SEC ) ),\\n        ] );\\n\\n        // 強制還原路徑 callback 拿不到 type，在此依還原的 type 補切乘倍底板\\n        this.SetMultiplierBaseByExtraBetType( type );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依 unshow 的原始/真實押注比值反推 ExtraBet type（即 Mul 索引）\\n     * @description Mul[type]/Mul[0] === UnshowRealBet/UnshowBaseBet；用交叉相乘（tools.times）避免浮點誤差。\\n     * 倍率表不足或對不上時保底回 1（Special），維持還原不中斷\\n     */\\n    private GetUnshowExtraBetType(): number {\\n        const FALLBACK_TYPE = 1;\\n        const baseBet = commonGameManager.UnshowBaseBet;\\n        const realBet = commonGameManager.UnshowRealBet;\\n        const mul = this.m_betMultipliers;\\n\\n        if ( !mul || mul.length <= 1 || baseBet <= 0 ) {\\n            error( `[GameView] ExtraBet 還原資料不足 (mul=${mul}, baseBet=${baseBet})，保底用 type=${FALLBACK_TYPE}` );\\n            return FALLBACK_TYPE;\\n        }\\n\\n        const target = tools.times( realBet, mul[ 0 ] );\\n        for ( let type = 1; type < mul.length; type++ ) {\\n            if ( tools.times( baseBet, mul[ type ] ) === target ) {\\n                return type;\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        error( `[GameView] ExtraBet 倍率對不上 (baseBet=${baseBet}, realBet=${realBet}, mul=${mul})，保底用 type=${FALLBACK_TYPE}` );\\n        return FALLBACK_TYPE;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示 Extra Bet 按鈕（info ack 就緒後呼叫）\\n     */\\n    private ShowExtraBet() {\\n        this.SetExtraBetVisible( true );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定 Extra Bet ) this.m_manual.node.active = v;\\n    }\\n\\n    public SetExtraBetVisible( v: boolean ) {\\n        if ( v && !this.m_showExtra ) return;   // server 未開放 ExtraBet → 不顯示（隱藏照常放行）\\n        this.m_extraBetComp?.ShowExtra( v );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 首次進入 IDLE 時自動展開 Extra Bet Bar 並顯示說明\\n     */\\n    async ExtraBetFirstShowBar() {\\n        if ( !this.m_showExtra ) return;   // server 未開放 ExtraBet → 不展開 Bar\\n        await this.m_extraBetComp?.FirstShowBar();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放Extra Bet啟用動畫\\n     */\\n    private async PlayExtraBetActiveAnimation() {\\n\\n        // });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 清除所有狀態（Extra Bet 專用）\\n     */\\n    ClearAllForExtraBet() {\\n        this.ClearAll();\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Extra Bet\\n\\n roundInfo.RoundWin ? roundInfo.RoundWin : 0;\\n        let bet = newBottombarManager.GetNowBetValue();\\n        let odds = tools.divide( win, bet ); // 贏分倍率\\n        let rand = Define.HAS_REPLAY ? 0 : Math.random(); // 機率條件(重播固定機率)\\n        \\n        if ( !this.m_isFreeGame )\\n        {\\n            // MG\\n            if ( roundInfo.RoundWin / bet >= 10 && odds >= 20 && rand < 0.2 )\\n            {\\n                return true;\\n            }\\n            // Enter FG\\n            if ( roundInfo.FeverTotalRound > 0 && rand < 0.2 )\\n            {\\n                return true;\\n            }\\n        }\\n        else\\n        {\\n            // FG\\n            if ( roundInfo.RoundWin / bet >= 15 && odds >= 50 && rand < 0.3 )\\n            {\\n                return true;\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /** 大獎預告 */\\n    async ShowBigAwardHint( roundInfo: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IRoundInfo )\\n    {\\n        let show = this.CheckBigAwardHint( roundInfo );\\n        if ( show )\\n        {\\n            await this.m_effectPlate.PlayBigAwardEffect();\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 載入測試資料（同步版本）\\n     * @param fileName 檔案名稱（不含副檔名）\\n     * @returns protocol.ar2rhProto.ISpinAck 解碼後的 SpinAck 資料\\n     */\\n    private LoadDemoDataSync(triggerKey: number): protocol.ar2pq9Proto.ISpinAck\\n    {\\n        let fileName = \\\"pirates_queen_triggerkey_\\\" + triggerKey;\\n\\n        // 使用同步載入方式\\n        const asset = this.LoadBinaryFile(fileName);\\n        \\n        if (!asset) {\\n            error(`載入測試檔案 ${fileName} 失敗: 檔案不存在`);\\n            throw new Error(`測試檔案 ${fileName} 不存在`);\\n        }\\n        \\n        try {\\n            let spinAckData: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.ISpinAck;\\n            if            }\\n        } catch (parseError) {\\n            error(`解析測試檔案 ${fileName} 失敗:`, parseError);\\n            throw parseError;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    // 震動：上下左右震，大瞄準\\n    BigHintShake( shakeTime: number )\\n    {\\n        let dt = Game_Define.BIG_SHAKE_DISTANCE;\\n        let time = Game_Define.BIG_SHAKE_FREQUENCY;\\n        // 重複次數\\n        let repeatTimes = aiTitle: 調查unshow時ExtraBet按鈕提前開啟問題

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>change</type>
  <title>Added Animation reference property for ExtraBet node control</title>
  <subtitle>GameView.ts gains a_extraBetAnimation property to directly control ExtraBet_OFF animation on cancel.</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>GameView.ts added property a_extraBetAnimation of type Animation for ExtraBetNode root Animation component</fact>
    <fact>Property tooltip states purpose is playing ExtraBet_OFF to turn off light when two-step ExtraBet is cancelled</fact>
    <fact>Previous fix attempt using m_extraBetComp?.OnRotation() callback did not work according to user feedback</fact>
    <fact>New approach bypasses framework layer by directly accessing Animation component on ExtraBetNode prefab</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>After discovering the previous fix (calling OnRotation on cancel) did not resolve the ExtraBet button lighting issue, the session pivoted to a direct Animation control approach. A new property a_extraBetAnimation was added to GameView.ts to hold a reference to the Animation component on ExtraBetNode's root. This allows GameView to directly play the ExtraBet_OFF animation clip when the two-step ExtraBet is cancelled, bypassing the framework's ExtraBetComponent layer. The investigation revealed that ExtraBetNode.prefab has an Animation component on its root with 6 animation clips, and this direct reference provides a way to forcefully turn off the button light without relying on framework methods that may be affected by the public version's missing m_isExtra guard.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
    <file>.claudedocs/ExtraBet-公版誤改還原記錄.md</file>
    <file>assets/game/Prefab/Effect/ExtraBetNode.prefab</file>
    <file>assets/Script/GameView.ts</file>
    <file>extensions/astarte-framework/assets/Component/ExtraBetComponent.ts</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/GameView.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 停止免費遊戲背景音樂\\n     */\\n    StopFreeGameBgm()\\n    {\\n        if (this.m_freeBgmId !== -1)\\n        {\\n            AudioManager.Stop(this.m_freeBgmId);\\n    FadeBgmIn(duration: number = 0.5): void {\\n        if (this.m_bgmId !== -1) AudioManager.SetMusicFadeIn(this.m_bgmId, duration, 1);\\n        if (this.m_freeBgmId !== -1) @description 透過 framework 的 ForceSetExtraBet 強制設值，搭配 InitExtraBet 中 isForce 分支跳過全版宣告動畫；\\n     * 依當初押注比值反推 type，避免 ExtraBet 有多種倍率時一律還原成第一種\\n     */\\n    public async RestoreExtraBetState() {\\n        if ( !this.m_showExtra ) return;   // server 未開放 ExtraBet → 不還原\\n\\n        // (A) 治本：先確保 EX 節點 active。framework ForceSetExtraBet 內部會 await\\n        // ExtraBet_Close 動畫的 FINISHED 事件，節點 inactive content.thinking:
The user is now implementing the actual fix logic. They've replaced the previous attempt (calling OnRotation) with directly controlling the Animation component on the ExtraBetNode.

The new logic:
1. When ExtraBet is cancelled (confirmed=false)
2. Schedule a callback for the next frame
3. In that callback, directly play "ExtraBet_OFF" on the a_extraBetAnimation
4. Then jump to the end of that animation using setTime(state.duration)

The comments explain:
- The framework's ChangeBetMode will unconditionally play "ExtraBet_Active" after the callback ends (line :507 missing m_isExtra guard)
- On the next frame (after that line), directly play "ExtraBet_OFF" and jump to end to turn off the light
- This overrides the mistaken light-up and turns off FX lighting (bar stays expanded, doesn't collapse)
- Note: the framework's OnRotation plays "ExtraBet_Stop" which doesn't have a corresponding .anim in this project, so direct Animation control is used instead

This is a significant implementation - they're working around the framework bug by directly controlling the animation at the project level.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>bugfix</type>
  <title>Implemented direct Animation control to fix ExtraBet button lighting on cancel</title>
  <subtitle>GameView now directly plays ExtraBet_OFF animation on next frame when cancel occurs to override framework's mistaken light-up.</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>InitExtraBet cancel branch now schedules callback that directly calls a_extraBetAnimation.play("ExtraBet_OFF")</fact>
    <fact>Callback uses getState().setTime(state.duration) to jump to animation end, immediately turning off FX lighting</fact>
    <fact>Logic executes on next frame (scheduleOnce with 0 delay) to run after framework's ChangeBetMode line :507</fact>
    <fact>Comments note framework OnRotation method plays "ExtraBet_Stop" which has no corresponding .anim file in this project</fact>
    <fact>Fix maintains expanded bar state while forcefully turning off the EX button light effects</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The fix implements a workaround for the framework's missing m_isExtra guard at line :507 in ChangeBetMode. When the two-step ExtraBet is cancelled (confirmed=false), the framework unconditionally plays "ExtraBet_Active" animation after the callback returns, causing the button to light up incorrectly. The new implementation schedules a next-frame callback that directly controls the ExtraBetNode's Animation component, playing "ExtraBet_OFF" and immediately jumping to its end frame. This happens one frame after the framework's mistaken light-up, effectively overriding it and turning off the FX lighting while keeping the bar in its expanded state. The approach bypasses the framework's OnRotation method (which would play "ExtraBet_Stop", an animation that doesn't exist in this project) and provides direct, explicit control over the visual state.</narrative>
